description_long: This object is a Japanese beverage vending machine, predominantly blue with a large illuminated product display on the front, featuring rows of assorted drinks behind a transparent panel. The vending machine is accompanied by a traditional wooden lantern on a post and a pair of trash bins, all set on a tiled ground. The vending machine's front panel includes a digital display, a payment interface, and a product retrieval slot, with visible branding for 'Suntory BOSS' coffee. The side of the machine is solid blue with prominent white branding, while the back is plain and metallic. The lantern is constructed from wood with a black tiled roof, adding a traditional touch to the urban setting. The trash bins are plastic, with one featuring a blue lid and the other a gray lid, placed adjacent to the vending machine.
description: A blue Japanese beverage vending machine with illuminated product display, payment interface, and 'Suntory BOSS' branding, accompanied by a traditional wooden lantern and trash bins.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vending machine's product display, payment interface, digital screen, and adjacent lantern and trash bins.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large 'Suntory BOSS' branding, the lantern's profile, and the tops of the trash bins.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain metallic back of the vending machine and the tops of the trash bins and lantern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the vending machine's blue side panel with branding and a clear view of the lantern's structure.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular illuminated display panel is located on the upper front of the vending machine, showing rows of beverage products and a digital screen below.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is visible on the right side of the front panel, including a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual rectangular selection buttons are arranged vertically next to each product row on the front panel, each labeled with product information.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot with a flap is located at the lower front of the vending machine.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large 'Suntory BOSS' branding with a logo and white text is prominently displayed on the side and front, along with Japanese text and images of beverages.
